title: erigeron chrysocoma
intro: Erigeron chrysocoma, also known as gold flecks fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Erigeron chrysocoma can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
